title: Building Inspector

rationales.taskAutomation: Plan review against code checklists is increasingly automatable, but on-site inspection judgment and sign-off liability keep most of the job gated.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-assisted code-compliance plan review tools are a credible, fast-improving product category, though not yet embedded everywhere.
rationales.adoption: Municipal building departments are budget-constrained government offices that adopt new review software slower than private engineering firms.
rationales.agenticExposure: Automated plan-check against code is a workflow an agent can meaningfully own, while physical site inspection stays human.

tasksGrowing: On-site structural and safety inspection judgment
Explaining violations and remediation to owners and contractors
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 47-4011, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: On-site inspection and client communication skills

insight: Plan-check paperwork is a good fit for automated compliance review; the physical walkthrough and sign-off liability are not.
